name: unopim
desc: Unopim is a free and open-source Laravel-based Product Information Management (PIM) system that helps businesses manage and enrich product data from a single p…
descFull: Unopim is a free and open-source Laravel-based Product Information Management (PIM) system that helps businesses manage and enrich product data from a single platform. Built to scale beyond 10M+ products, now evolving with Agentic PIM capabilities.
